auth.user_only: This page is available to users only.

login.title: Continue your learning journey with QuizWiz!
login.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.password_pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one special character, and be at least 6 characters long

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.description: Don't worry, it happens. Enter your email address to reset your password.
forgot.error: Something went wrong while sending the reset code.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.description: We've sent a verification code to your email. Please check your inbox and enter the code to continue.
reset.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
reset.password_pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one special character, and be at least 6 characters long
reset.error: Something went wrong while resetting your password.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Update your password to keep your account secure. Enter your current password and choose a new one.
change_password.password_pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one special character, and be at least 6 characters long

register.title: Create your account and start using QuizWiz!
register.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
register.password_pattern: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
